features: Beautifully wrapped and ready to pop under the tree, indulge in all your bath time essentials for the perfect pamper night
Contains 300ml bath soak, 300ml body wash, 50ml hand cream and 60g scented candle
description: Product Description Beautifully wrapped and ready to pop under the tree, treat her to a luxury candlelit pamper with our 300ml bath soak, 300ml body wash, 50ml hand cream and 60g scented candle in cocktail inspired fragrances. Indulge in a cocktail-inspired experience that's as vibrant and the holiday season. This collection reimagines classic cocktails into luxurious self-care essentials. Immerse yourself in the tropical allure of Mango Mimosa, the playful sweetness of Strawberry Daiquiri, the festive sparkle of Cranberry Fizz, and the indulgent richness of Berry Crush. Each fragrance is meticulously crafted to capture the essence of these iconic drinks, transporting you to a world of festive cheer. Adorned with bold colours and dazzling gold foil accents, this collection reflects the playful spirit and pays homage to the glamorous Art Deco era. A cocktail-inspired collection featuring Cranberry Fizz, Mango Mimosa and Strawberry Daiquiri offering a delightful, fruity and refreshing experience. Perfect for a pamper night in. Ingredients Bath Soak: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4.Body Wash: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Limonene. Hand Cream: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Citronellol, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Eugenol, Geraniol Limonene, Linalyl Acetate, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes. Directions Bath Soak - Pour Into Bath Under Warm Running Water. Body Wash - Lather And Rinse. Hand Cream - Massage Gently Into Skin Until Fully Absorbed. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. Manufacturer Contact Information Baylis & Harding Plc, B98 7AS, England. RP. MSL, Suite 5385, 27 Upper Pembroke St, Dublin, IE. See more
